title: India On Highest Alert To Safeguard Seafarers, Steps Up Maritime Vigil Amid Evolving Gulf Maritime Security Crisis
description: The Indian Government is actively monitoring security in the Gulf to protect seafarers and maritime interests. The Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways collaborates with the Navy and welfare organizations for timely aid. Recent events, like the missile attack on the MT Settebello, emphasize risks.
